source.section: 5 - Waypoints > 5.5 - How to Edit Waypoints > a - LAT/LONG Coordinates

steps.action: In the HSI page, press the OSB next to DATA.
You will see the waypoint sequence. We want to edit the coordinates of Waypoint 7 (which we created in the previous tutorial).
Press the Waypoint Increment/Decrement OSBs to select WYPT 7
Press the OSB next to UFC (Up-Front Controller)
On the UFC, press the OSB next to POSN (Position). « : » will appear once selected.
We will add the coordinates of the Senaki-Kolkhi Airdrome, which are in (deg, minutes, sec): 42°14.31’ North 42°03.64’ East
On the UFC, press « 2 » (N) to select North coordinates, type « 421431 », then « ENT » to enter them.
On the UFC, press « 6 » (E) to select East coordinates, type « 420364 », then « ENT » to enter them.
And that’s it! You have edited Waypoint 7’s coordinates. If you click on the OSB next to HSI, you can see that Waypoint 7 is now visible in the sequence lines. 5 - WAYPOINTS
